corpus: 16 benign patterns (4 added: VRF, pull-payment, transfer-reverts, tx.origin-logging)
finding: RAG-grounding the LLM (inject category benign patterns) raises precision, but a directive prompt over-drops and cost 1 real vuln (recall 93.3%). Re-framing grounding as a reference checklist restored recall to 100% while still beating ungrounded: +28.6pp precision (1.7x) at ZERO recall cost.
lesson: Recall-safety must be enforced in the PROMPT, not only the verdict logic. RAG-grounding must be reference, never directive. The extra +6pp of the directive prompt is not worth a missed vulnerability.
